treating raw substrate mappings as semantic truth

findings_fixed: FramebufferWindowLease validates exact DisplayCapability generation instead of trusting a display label
FramebufferWindowLease validates exact Store, DisplayObject, and FramebufferObject generations before creating live edges
FramebufferWindowLease validates display geometry, framebuffer byte bounds, and byte offset derived from window geometry before recording semantic evidence
ContractGraph exposes lease edges as live ObjectRef edges and rejects missing display capability references
ContractGraph rejects malformed packages where lease window geometry and framebuffer byte window drift apart
osctl ViewV1 exposes lease authority boundaries without leaking adapter or substrate internals
